replacements.originalText: Cloud Agents require a Git repository in an open folder.
replacements.changeText: 云端智能体需要在已打开的文件夹中包含 Git 仓库。

replacements.originalText: Background agents only work in folders with a git repository. Please open a folder that contains a git repository to use this feature.
replacements.changeText: 后台智能体仅在包含 Git 仓库的文件夹中工作。请打开包含 Git 仓库的文件夹以使用此功能。
正在加载云端智能体设置…
